name: pr_cep_expwin_gap
drl: rule R when $a : A($ac : acct) $b : B(acct == $ac, this after[0ms,10000ms] $a) then end
_finding: Explicit expires SHORTER than a temporal window, partner in the GAP (5000 < 7000 <= 10000): the anchor expired, the join CANNOT fire — the declared window silently truncates at the anchor's lifetime. Oracle-faithful (explicit @expires overrides; no inference). The authoring layer rejects this shape statically (D-219).
